name: software-forge
description: Full software development lifecycle for AI coding agents — classifies your project, sequences design phases grounded in 17 engineering books, and orchestrates 28 skills from idea to deployment

software-forge.description: Universal project lifecycle orchestrator — classifies your project, selects applicable phases (4-15), and walks through each sequentially

brainstorming.description: Turn vague ideas into approved design docs through collaborative dialogue

ddia-design.description: System design guided by Designing Data-Intensive Applications principles

writing-plans.description: Create structured implementation plans from design docs

subagent-driven-development.description: Execute implementation plans using parallel subagents in the current session

executing-plans.description: Execute implementation plans with review checkpoints in a separate session

test-driven-development.description: Strict TDD workflow — write failing tests first, implement, refactor

systematic-debugging.description: 4-phase root cause analysis — never fix symptoms, always find the source

using-git-worktrees.description: Isolate feature work in git worktrees with safety verification

finishing-a-development-branch.description: Guide completion of development work — merge, PR, or cleanup options

verification-before-completion.description: Run verification commands and confirm output before claiming success

dispatching-parallel-agents.description: Coordinate 2+ independent tasks with parallel subagents

requesting-code-review.description: Dispatch code reviewer subagent to catch issues before they cascade

receiving-code-review.description: Process code review feedback with technical rigor, not blind agreement

code-simplifier.description: Remove unnecessary abstractions, over-engineering, and cognitive overhead

ui-polish-review.description: 7-phase visual design audit based on Refactoring UI principles

ux-usability-review.description: 8-phase usability audit based on Don't Make Me Think principles

design-code-review.description: Review SwiftUI code against Design+Code principles

apple-craftsman.description: Craft stunning macOS desktop experiences with cinematic animations and glass materials

mobile-ios-design.description: Master iOS Human Interface Guidelines and SwiftUI patterns

security-audit.description: Audit CSP, RLS, auth, dependencies, and OWASP vulnerabilities

web-app-security-audit.description: 10-phase penetration testing methodology for web applications

voice-agent-prompt.description: Engineer system prompts for LiveKit voice agents with multilingual support

using-software-forge.description: Meta-skill that enforces skill usage — ensures relevant skills are invoked before any action

engineering-mentor.description: Adaptive teaching wrapper — builds systems while upskilling the engineer through decision gates, Socratic teaching, and competency tracking

release.description: Cut a professional release — bump version, write release notes, commit, tag, and push
